title: ProviderAttempt
description: One operational provider-attempt row. Modeled after the documented BabySea Supabase provider_cost_log source shape.

id.description: Database-generated provider_cost_log identity. SDK insert payloads may omit it; Databricks source tables/views must expose it for Bronze lineage.

schema_version.description: Always 'attempt.v1' for this schema. The Supabase table may omit this generated/export-only field.

generation_id.description: Stable workload/generation identifier shared by all attempts for the same request.

account_id.description: Optional tenant/account identifier. Keep region-local for sovereignty-sensitive deployments.

provider.description: Provider that was submitted to, e.g. replicate, fal, cloudflare.

provider_model_id.description: Provider-native model identifier, if different from the canonical model field.

prediction_id.description: Provider job/prediction identifier used for reconciliation.

model.description: Canonical application model identifier, e.g. black-forest-labs/flux-schnell.

estimated_cost.description: Estimated or actual provider cost for this attempt in USD.

outcome.description: Final operational outcome for the attempt.

attempt_order.description: 1 for the first provider tried, 2+ for failover attempts.

submitted_at.description: When the provider attempt was submitted.

resolved_at.description: When the provider attempt reached a terminal outcome. Null while pending.

error_message.description: Sanitized coarse error message or class. Do not store provider secrets or raw request bodies.

metadata.description: Small operational metadata bag. Avoid PII and secrets.
